profile.innate_zh: 逻辑天赋异禀、钻研精神、好胜心强
profile.learned_zh: 高中数学竞赛的训练节奏延续到了大学
profile.learned_en: HS competition rhythm carried into college
profile.belief_zh: 数学之美在于它的确定性
profile.belief_en: Math's beauty lies in its certainty
profile.goal_zh: 拿全国大学生数学竞赛金奖
profile.goal_en: Gold at National College Math Competition
profile.contradiction_zh: 热爱纯数学 vs 周围人都在问数学能干嘛
profile.contradiction_en: Loves pure math vs. everyone asks what it's for
profile.deep_zh: 对数学有近乎偏执的热爱
profile.desire_zh: 证明一个属于自己的定理
profile.rhythm_zh: 上午做题效率最高，下午看书，晚上回顾
profile.rhythm_en: Drills AM, reading PM, review at night
profile.spaces_zh: 数学楼讨论室、图书馆、宿舍
profile.long_desire_zh: 竞赛前把历年真题全部刷完
profile.long_desire_en: Finish all past papers before the contest
profile.short_goal_zh: 攻克昨天没做出来的那道积分不等式
profile.constraint_zh: 分析课太难了；缺乏和高水平选手交流的机会
profile.constraint_en: Analysis class is brutal; lacks high-level peers
profile.bias_zh: 倾向把应用数学看成不纯粹的
profile.narrative_zh: 如果连这道题都做不出来，金奖就别想了
profile.narrative_en: If I can't solve this, forget the gold
